zh.Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke於1351年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德哈維斯可爾可時，她的父親Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke11348歲，母親Jeanne de Molliens32歲。她於1366年7月9日與Jean DE CRÉQUY III在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年之後在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke于1351年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德哈維斯可爾可时，她的父亲Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke11348岁，母亲Jeanne de Molliens32岁。她于1366年7月9日与Jean DE CRÉQUY III在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1425年之后在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯克雷基。

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke was born in 1351, in Haverskerque, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke, was 11348 and her mother, Jeanne de Molliens, was 32. She married Jean DE CRÉQUY III on 9 July 1366, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1425, in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke est née en 1351, à Haverskerque, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke, avait 11348 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Molliens, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Jean DE CRÉQUY III le 9 juillet 1366, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1425, à Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke 1351 in Haverskerque, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke 11348 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Molliens 32. Sie hat am 9. Juli 1366 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jean DE CRÉQUY III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1425 in Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke è nata il nel 1351 nel Haverskerque, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke, aveva 11348 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Molliens, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Jean DE CRÉQUY III il 9 luglio 1366, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1425, nel Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame Jeanne de Haveskerkeが1351年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードヘイバースケルクで生まれた時，父Seigneur Jean de Haveskerkeは11348歳，母Jeanne de Molliensは32歳であった。1366年7月9日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでJean DE CRÉQUY IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年以後にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスクルeクイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke(이)가 1351년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 하버스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke(은)는 11348세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Molliens(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1366년 7월 9일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Jean DE CRÉQUY III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 이후 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 크e크이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke nasceu em 1351, em Haverskerque, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke, tinha 11348 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Molliens, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean DE CRÉQUY III em 9 de julho de 1366, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1425, em Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke родилась в 1351 г. в местности хавирскирку, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke было 11348 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Molliens, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean DE CRÉQUY III 9 июля 1366 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1425 г. в местности крeкуи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Jeanne de Haveskerke nació en 1351, en Haverskerque, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Seigneur Jean de Haveskerke, tenía 11348 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Molliens, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jean DE CRÉQUY III el 9 de julio de 1366, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1425, en Créquy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
